mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "totalCount", SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT_STATUS = 'FAIL' OR RESULT_STATUS = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "errorCount", SUM(CASE WHEN ELAPSED_TIME_MS >= 5000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "timeoutCount", COALESCE(AVG(ELAPSED_TIME_MS), 0) AS "avgElapsedMs" FROM TCF_TX_LOG WHERE 1 = 1
AND TX_TIME LIKE #{baseDate} || '%'

SELECT SERVICE_ID AS "serviceId", ERROR_CODE AS "errorCode", COUNT(*) AS "errorCount" FROM TCF_TX_LOG WHERE (RESULT_STATUS = 'FAIL' OR RESULT_STATUS = 'ERROR') AND TX_TIME >= #{fromTime} AND TX_TIME <= #{toTime} GROUP BY SERVICE_ID, ERROR_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT TX_TIME AS "txTime", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", SERVICE_ID AS "serviceId", TRANSACTION_CODE AS "transactionCode", GUID AS "guid", USER_ID AS "userId", RESULT_STATUS AS "resultStatus", ELAPSED_TIME_MS AS "elapsedTimeMs" FROM TCF_TX_LOG WHERE TX_TIME >= #{fromTime} AND TX_TIME <= #{toTime} ORDER BY ELAPSED_TIME_MS DESC, TX_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT AP_ID AS "apId", AP_NAME AS "apName", HEALTH_STATUS AS "healthStatus", CPU_USAGE_PCT AS "cpuUsagePct", HEAP_USAGE_PCT AS "heapUsagePct", THREAD_COUNT AS "threadCount", CHECKED_AT AS "checkedAt" FROM OM_AP_STATUS WHERE AP_ID NOT IN ('ap01', 'ap02', 'om-local') ORDER BY AP_ID

SELECT DB_ID AS "dbId", DB_NAME AS "dbName", HEALTH_STATUS AS "healthStatus", POOL_USAGE_PCT AS "poolUsagePct", CHECKED_AT AS "checkedAt" FROM OM_DB_STATUS WHERE DB_ID NOT IN ('RDW', 'ADW', 'SESSIONDB') ORDER BY DB_ID

SELECT SCOPE_ID AS "scopeId", SCOPE_NAME AS "scopeName", ACTIVE_COUNT AS "activeCount", EXPIRED_COUNT AS "expiredCount", TOTAL_COUNT AS "totalCount", UNIQUE_USER_COUNT AS "uniqueUserCount", HEALTH_STATUS AS "healthStatus", CHECKED_AT AS "checkedAt" FROM OM_SESSION_STATUS ORDER BY SCOPE_ID
mapper.sql: WHERE NOT ( HEALTH_STATUS IN ('FAIL', 'DOWN') AND COALESCE(ACTIVE_COUNT, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(EXPIRED_COUNT, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(TOTAL_COUNT, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(UNIQUE_USER_COUNT, 0) = 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ACTIVE_COUNT), 0) FROM OM_SESSION_STATUS
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(EXPIRED_COUNT), 0) FROM OM_SESSION_STATUS
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(UNIQUE_USER_COUNT), 0) FROM OM_SESSION_STATUS

SELECT BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", WAR_NAME AS "warName", WAR_VERSION AS "warVersion", DEPLOYED_AT AS "deployedAt", HEALTH_STATUS AS "healthStatus" FROM OM_DEPLOY_STATUS WHERE BUSINESS_CODE <> 'ET' ORDER BY BUSINESS_CODE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPRING_SESSION

SELECT LOG_ID AS "logId", TX_TIME AS "txTime", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", SERVICE_ID AS "serviceId", TRANSACTION_CODE AS "transactionCode", GUID AS "guid", TRACE_ID AS "traceId", USER_ID AS "userId", BRANCH_ID AS "branchId", RESULT_STATUS AS "resultStatus", RESULT_CODE AS "resultCode", ERROR_CODE AS "errorCode", ELAPSED_TIME_MS AS "elapsedTimeMs" FROM TCF_TX_LOG WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY TX_TIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TCF_TX_LOG WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "totalCount", SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT_STATUS = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "successCount", SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT_STATUS = 'FAIL' OR RESULT_STATUS = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "errorCount", SUM(CASE WHEN ELAPSED_TIME_MS >= 5000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "timeoutCount", COALESCE(AVG(ELAPSED_TIME_MS), 0) AS "avgElapsedMs" FROM TCF_TX_LOG WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT CATALOG_ID AS "catalogId", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", SERVICE_ID AS "serviceId", TRANSACTION_CODE AS "transactionCode", PROCESSING_TYPE AS "processingType", HANDLER_CLASS AS "handlerClass", AUTH_CODE AS "authCode", AUDIT_YN AS "auditYn", TIMEOUT_SEC AS "timeoutSec", USE_YN AS "useYn", DESCRIPTION AS "description" FROM OM_SERVICE_CATALOG WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY BUSINESS_CODE, SERVICE_ID
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OM_SERVICE_CATALOG WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT CATALOG_ID AS "catalogId", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", SERVICE_ID AS "serviceId", TRANSACTION_CODE AS "transactionCode", PROCESSING_TYPE AS "processingType", HANDLER_CLASS AS "handlerClass", AUTH_CODE AS "authCode", AUDIT_YN AS "auditYn", TIMEOUT_SEC AS "timeoutSec", USE_YN AS "useYn", DESCRIPTION AS "description" FROM OM_SERVICE_CATALOG WHERE CATALOG_ID = #{catalogId}

SELECT CATALOG_ID AS "catalogId", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", SERVICE_ID AS "serviceId", TRANSACTION_CODE AS "transactionCode", PROCESSING_TYPE AS "processingType", HANDLER_CLASS AS "handlerClass", AUTH_CODE AS "authCode", AUDIT_YN AS "auditYn", TIMEOUT_SEC AS "timeoutSec", USE_YN AS "useYn", DESCRIPTION AS "description" FROM OM_SERVICE_CATALOG WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId}
mapper.update: UPDATE OM_SERVICE_CATALOG SET BUSINESS_CODE = #{businessCode}, SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId}, TRANSACTION_CODE = #{transactionCode}, PROCESSING_TYPE = #{processingType}, HANDLER_CLASS = #{handlerClass}, AUTH_CODE = #{authCode}, AUDIT_YN = #{auditYn}, TIMEOUT_SEC = #{timeoutSec}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, DESCRIPTION = #{description} WHERE CATALOG_ID = #{catalogId}
mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID AS "userId", U.USER_NAME AS "userName", U.BRANCH_ID AS "branchId", U.AUTH_GROUP_ID AS "authGroupId", G.AUTH_GROUP_NAME AS "authGroupName", U.USE_YN AS "useYn", U.LAST_LOGIN_TIME AS "lastLoginTime" FROM OM_USER U LEFT JOIN OM_AUTH_GROUP G ON U.AUTH_GROUP_ID = G.AUTH_GROUP_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OM_USER (USER_ID, USER_NAME, PASSWORD_HASH, BRANCH_ID, AUTH_GROUP_ID, USE_YN, LAST_LOGIN_TIME) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{passwordHash}, #{branchId}, #{authGroupId}, #{useYn}, #{lastLoginTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE OM_USER SET USER_NAME = #{userName}, BRANCH_ID = #{branchId}, AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{authGroupId}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, PASSWORD_HASH = #{passwordHash} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE OM_USER SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID AS "userId", U.USER_NAME AS "userName", U.PASSWORD_HASH AS "passwordHash", U.BRANCH_ID AS "branchId", U.AUTH_GROUP_ID AS "authGroupId", G.AUTH_GROUP_NAME AS "authGroupName", U.USE_YN AS "useYn", U.LAST_LOGIN_TIME AS "lastLoginTime" FROM OM_USER U LEFT JOIN OM_AUTH_GROUP G ON U.AUTH_GROUP_ID = G.AUTH_GROUP_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID AS "userId" FROM OM_USER WHERE PASSWORD_HASH IS NULL OR TRIM(PASSWORD_HASH) = ''

SELECT M.MENU_ID AS "menuId", M.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') AS "menuUrl", COALESCE(M.PARENT_MENU_ID, '') AS "parentMenuId", COALESCE(P.MENU_NAME, '') AS "parentMenuName", M.SORT_ORDER AS "sortOrder", M.USE_YN AS "useYn" FROM OM_MENU M LEFT JOIN OM_MENU P ON P.MENU_ID = M.PARENT_MENU_ID WHERE M.MENU_ID = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OM_MENU (MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_URL, PARENT_MENU_ID, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{menuName}, #{menuUrl}, #{parentMenuId}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE OM_MENU SET MENU_NAME = #{menuName}, MENU_URL = #{menuUrl}, PARENT_MENU_ID = #{parentMenuId}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn} WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
UPDATE OM_MENU SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
mapper.select: SELECT AUTH_GROUP_ID AS "authGroupId", AUTH_GROUP_NAME AS "authGroupName", DESCRIPTION AS "description", USE_YN AS "useYn" FROM OM_AUTH_GROUP WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{authGroupId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OM_FUNCTION_AUTH WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{authGroupId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OM_DATA_AUTH WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{authGroupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OM_AUTH_GROUP (AUTH_GROUP_ID, AUTH_GROUP_NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN) VALUES (#{authGroupId}, #{authGroupName}, #{description}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE OM_AUTH_GROUP SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{authGroupId}
mapper.select:
SELECT AUDIT_ID AS "auditId", AUDIT_TIME AS "auditTime", USER_ID AS "userId", BRANCH_ID AS "branchId", CUSTOMER_NO AS "customerNo", FUNCTION_ID AS "functionId", FUNCTION_NAME AS "functionName", INQUIRY_REASON AS "inquiryReason", RESULT_STATUS AS "resultStatus", CLIENT_IP AS "clientIp" FROM OM_AUDIT_LOG WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY AUDIT_TIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OM_AUDIT_LOG WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT HISTORY_ID AS "historyId", JOB_ID AS "jobId", RUN_TIME AS "runTime", RUN_STATUS AS "runStatus", DURATION_MS AS "durationMs", RESULT_MESSAGE AS "resultMessage" FROM OM_BATCH_HISTORY WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY RUN_TIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OM_BATCH_HISTORY WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT LOG_ID AS "logId", DOWNLOAD_TIME AS "downloadTime", USER_ID AS "userId", FILE_NAME AS "fileName", FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", RESULT_STATUS AS "resultStatus", CLIENT_IP AS "clientIp" FROM OM_FILE_DOWNLOAD_LOG WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY DOWNLOAD_TIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OM_FILE_DOWNLOAD_LOG WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OM_FILE_DOWNLOAD_LOG (LOG_ID, DOWNLOAD_TIME, USER_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, BUSINESS_CODE, RESULT_STATUS, CLIENT_IP) VALUES (#{logId}, #{downloadTime}, #{userId}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{businessCode}, #{resultStatus}, #{clientIp})
mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_GROUP AS "codeGroup", CODE AS "code", CODE_NAME AS "codeName", SORT_ORDER AS "sortOrder", USE_YN AS "useYn", DESCRIPTION AS "description", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt", UPDATED_AT AS "updatedAt" FROM OM_COMMON_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY CODE_GROUP, SORT_ORDER, CODE
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OM_COMMON_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT DISTINCT CODE_GROUP FROM OM_COMMON_CODE ORDER BY CODE_GROUP

SELECT F.AUTH_ID AS "authId", F.AUTH_GROUP_ID AS "authGroupId", G.AUTH_GROUP_NAME AS "authGroupName", F.MENU_ID AS "menuId", M.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", F.CAN_INQUIRY AS "canInquiry", F.CAN_REGISTER AS "canRegister", F.CAN_UPDATE AS "canUpdate", F.CAN_DELETE AS "canDelete", F.CAN_DOWNLOAD AS "canDownload" FROM OM_FUNCTION_AUTH F LEFT JOIN OM_AUTH_GROUP G ON F.AUTH_GROUP_ID = G.AUTH_GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN OM_MENU M ON F.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID WHERE F.AUTH_ID = #{authId}
mapper.update: UPDATE OM_FUNCTION_AUTH SET AUTH_GROUP_ID = #{authGroupId}, MENU_ID = #{menuId}, CAN_INQUIRY = #{canInquiry}, CAN_REGISTER = #{canRegister}, CAN_UPDATE = #{canUpdate}, CAN_DELETE = #{canDelete}, CAN_DOWNLOAD = #{canDownload} WHERE AUTH_ID = #{authId}
mapper.select:
SELECT HISTORY_ID AS "historyId", CHANGED_AT AS "changedAt", CHANGED_BY AS "changedBy", TARGET_TYPE AS "targetType", TARGET_ID AS "targetId", BEFORE_VALUE AS "beforeValue", AFTER_VALUE AS "afterValue", CHANGE_REASON AS "changeReason" FROM OM_AUTH_HISTORY WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY CHANGED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OM_AUTH_HISTORY WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OM_AUTH_HISTORY (HISTORY_ID, CHANGED_AT, CHANGED_BY, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, BEFORE_VALUE, AFTER_VALUE, CHANGE_REASON) VALUES (#{historyId}, #{changedAt}, #{changedBy}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{beforeValue}, #{afterValue}, #{changeReason})
mapper.select: SELECT ERROR_CODE AS "errorCode", ERROR_CATEGORY AS "errorCategory", USER_MESSAGE AS "userMessage", OPERATOR_MESSAGE AS "operatorMessage", ACTION_GUIDE AS "actionGuide", NOTIFY_TARGET AS "notifyTarget", USE_YN AS "useYn" FROM OM_ERROR_CODE WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO OM_ERROR_CODE (ERROR_CODE, ERROR_CATEGORY, USER_MESSAGE, OPERATOR_MESSAGE, ACTION_GUIDE, NOTIFY_TARGET, USE_YN) KEY (ERROR_CODE) VALUES (#{errorCode}, #{errorCategory}, #{userMessage}, #{operatorMessage}, #{actionGuide}, #{notifyTarget}, #{useYn})

INSERT INTO OM_ERROR_CODE (ERROR_CODE, ERROR_CATEGORY, USER_MESSAGE, OPERATOR_MESSAGE, ACTION_GUIDE, NOTIFY_TARGET, USE_YN) VALUES (#{errorCode}, #{errorCategory}, #{userMessage}, #{operatorMessage}, #{actionGuide}, #{notifyTarget}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE OM_ERROR_CODE SET ERROR_CATEGORY = #{errorCategory}, USER_MESSAGE = #{userMessage}, OPERATOR_MESSAGE = #{operatorMessage}, ACTION_GUIDE = #{actionGuide}, NOTIFY_TARGET = #{notifyTarget}, USE_YN = #{useYn} WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode}
mapper.select:
SELECT SERVICE_ID AS "serviceId", TRANSACTION_CODE AS "transactionCode", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", SERVICE_NAME AS "serviceName", ONLINE_TIMEOUT_SEC AS "onlineTimeoutSec", TX_TIMEOUT_SEC AS "txTimeoutSec", DB_QUERY_TIMEOUT_SEC AS "dbQueryTimeoutSec", EXTERNAL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS AS "externalConnectTimeoutMs", EXTERNAL_READ_TIMEOUT_MS AS "externalReadTimeoutMs", TIMEOUT_ACTION AS "timeoutAction", USE_YN AS "useYn", DESCRIPTION AS "description" FROM TCF_SERVICE_TIMEOUT_POLICY WHERE 1 = 1
AND SERVICE_ID LIKE '%' || #{serviceId} || '%'
AND TRANSACTION_CODE LIKE '%' || #{transactionCode} || '%'
AND BUSINESS_CODE = #{businessCode}
AND USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY BUSINESS_CODE, SERVICE_ID, TRANSACTION_CODE
OFFSET (#{pageNo} - 1) * #{pageSize} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT SERVICE_ID AS "serviceId", TRANSACTION_CODE AS "transactionCode", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", SERVICE_NAME AS "serviceName", ONLINE_TIMEOUT_SEC AS "onlineTimeoutSec", TX_TIMEOUT_SEC AS "txTimeoutSec", DB_QUERY_TIMEOUT_SEC AS "dbQueryTimeoutSec", EXTERNAL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS AS "externalConnectTimeoutMs", EXTERNAL_READ_TIMEOUT_MS AS "externalReadTimeoutMs", TIMEOUT_ACTION AS "timeoutAction", USE_YN AS "useYn", DESCRIPTION AS "description" FROM TCF_SERVICE_TIMEOUT_POLICY WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId} AND TRANSACTION_CODE = #{transactionCode} AND BUSINESS_CODE = #{businessCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TCF_SERVICE_TIMEOUT_POLICY ( SERVICE_ID, TRANSACTION_CODE, BUSINESS_CODE, SERVICE_NAME, ONLINE_TIMEOUT_SEC, TX_TIMEOUT_SEC, DB_QUERY_TIMEOUT_SEC, EXTERNAL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS, EXTERNAL_READ_TIMEOUT_MS, TIMEOUT_ACTION, USE_YN, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{serviceId}, #{transactionCode}, #{businessCode}, #{serviceName}, #{onlineTimeoutSec}, #{txTimeoutSec}, #{dbQueryTimeoutSec}, #{externalConnectTimeoutMs}, #{externalReadTimeoutMs}, #{timeoutAction}, #{useYn}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE TCF_SERVICE_TIMEOUT_POLICY SET SERVICE_NAME = #{serviceName}, ONLINE_TIMEOUT_SEC = #{onlineTimeoutSec}, TX_TIMEOUT_SEC = #{txTimeoutSec}, DB_QUERY_TIMEOUT_SEC = #{dbQueryTimeoutSec}, EXTERNAL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS = #{externalConnectTimeoutMs}, EXTERNAL_READ_TIMEOUT_MS = #{externalReadTimeoutMs}, TIMEOUT_ACTION = #{timeoutAction}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId} AND TRANSACTION_CODE = #{transactionCode} AND BUSINESS_CODE = #{businessCode}
mapper.select: SELECT JOB_ID AS "jobId", JOB_NAME AS "jobName", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", CRON_EXPR AS "cronExpr", USE_YN AS "useYn", DESCRIPTION AS "description" FROM OM_BATCH_JOB WHERE JOB_ID = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OM_BATCH_HISTORY (HISTORY_ID, JOB_ID, RUN_TIME, RUN_STATUS, DURATION_MS, RESULT_MESSAGE) VALUES (#{historyId}, #{jobId}, #{runTime}, #{runStatus}, #{durationMs}, #{resultMessage})
mapper.select:
SELECT CACHE_NAME AS "cacheName", CACHE_KEY AS "cacheKey", ENTRY_COUNT AS "entryCount", LAST_UPDATED AS "lastUpdated", TTL_SEC AS "ttlSec" FROM OM_CACHE_STATUS WHERE 1 = 1
AND CACHE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{cacheName} || '%'
AND CACHE_KEY = #{cacheKey}
ORDER BY CACHE_NAME, CACHE_KEY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OM_AUDIT_LOG (AUDIT_ID, AUDIT_TIME, USER_ID, BRANCH_ID, CUSTOMER_NO, FUNCTION_ID, FUNCTION_NAME, INQUIRY_REASON, RESULT_STATUS, CLIENT_IP) VALUES (#{auditId}, #{auditTime}, #{userId}, #{branchId}, #{customerNo}, #{functionId}, #{functionName}, #{inquiryReason}, #{resultStatus}, #{clientIp})
mapper.select:
SELECT S.SESSION_ID AS "sessionId", S.PRINCIPAL_NAME AS "userId", S.CREATION_TIME AS "creationTime", S.LAST_ACCESS_TIME AS "lastAccessTime", S.MAX_INACTIVE_INTERVAL AS "maxInactiveInterval", S.EXPIRY_TIME AS "expiryTime", U.USER_NAME AS "userName", U.BRANCH_ID AS "branchId", U.AUTH_GROUP_ID AS "authGroupId", G.AUTH_GROUP_NAME AS "authGroupName", CASE WHEN S.EXPIRY_TIME > #{now} THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "activeYn" FROM SPRING_SESSION S LEFT JOIN OM_USER U ON S.PRINCIPAL_NAME = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN OM_AUTH_GROUP G ON U.AUTH_GROUP_ID = G.AUTH_GROUP_ID WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY S.LAST_ACCESS_TIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPRING_SESSION S WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPRING_SESSION WHERE EXPIRY_TIME > #{value}

SELECT S.SESSION_ID AS "sessionId", S.PRINCIPAL_NAME AS "userId", S.CREATION_TIME AS "creationTime", S.LAST_ACCESS_TIME AS "lastAccessTime", S.MAX_INACTIVE_INTERVAL AS "maxInactiveInterval", S.EXPIRY_TIME AS "expiryTime" FROM SPRING_SESSION S WHERE S.SESSION_ID = #{sessionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPRING_SESSION WHERE EXPIRY_TIME <= #{value}
